room.caption: [G5-1D] This was fun to make and originally way harder in its initial release to the testers.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sMorphBallPickup image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You can now use the Morph Ball!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2700 instance_destroy()
